Does a bunch of stuff.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`TROLL_profile_compiler()`](TROLL_profile_compiler.md) : Bulk Process
  TROLL Sonde Profiles
- [`TROLL_read_data()`](TROLL_read_data.md) : Read Aqua-Troll Data File
- [`TROLL_rename_cols()`](TROLL_rename_cols.md) : Standardize TROLL Data
  Column Names
- [`TROLL_sensor_stable()`](TROLL_sensor_stable.md) : Identify Stable
  Sensor Values Within Stationary Profiling Blocks
- [`TROLL_stable_summary()`](TROLL_stable_summary.md) : Summarize stable
  TROLL observations
- [`combine_hobos()`](combine_hobos.md) : Combine HOBO Logger Datasets
- [`hoboformat()`](hoboformat.md) : Format and Trim HOBO Logger Files
- [`is_stationary()`](is_stationary.md) : Identify Stationary Periods in
  Depth Data
- [`plot_hobos()`](plot_hobos.md) : Plot HOBO Logger Data
- [`stability_ranges`](stability_ranges.md) : Default Range Values For
  Flagging Sensor Stability
- [`troll_column_dictionary`](troll_column_dictionary.md) : Aqua TROLL
  Column Mapping and Metadata Dictionary
